sentences.target: Meine Eltern wollen Handys beim Essen verbieten.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʔɛltɐn ˈvɔlən ˈhɛndis baɪ̯m ˈʔɛsn̩ fɛɐ̯ˈbiːtən/

translations.de: Meine Eltern wollen Handys beim Essen verbieten.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʔɛltɐn ˈvɔlən ˈhɛndis baɪ̯m ˈʔɛsn̩ fɛɐ̯ˈbiːtən/
translations.en: My parents want to ban phones during dinner.
translations.es: Mis padres quieren prohibir los teléfonos durante la cena.
translations.fr: Mes parents veulent interdire les portables pendant le dîner.
translations.it: I miei genitori vogliono vietare i cellulari a cena.
translations.ko: 부모님은 저녁 먹을 때 휴대폰 사용을 금지하려고 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母想在吃晚饭时禁止使用手机。
translations.yue: 我爸媽想喺食晚飯嗰陣唔准用手機。
translations.ru: Мои родители хотят запретить пользоваться телефонами во время ужина.
translations.pt: Meus pais querem proibir o uso de celulares durante o jantar.
translations.he: ההורים שלי רוצים לאסור שימוש בטלפונים בזמן ארוחת ערב.
translations.tr: Anne babam akşam yemeğinde telefon kullanımını yasaklamak istiyor.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi muốn cấm dùng điện thoại trong bữa tối.
translations.ar: والداي يريدان منع استخدام الهواتف أثناء العشاء.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders willen telefoons tijdens het avondeten verbieden.
translations.uk: Мої батьки хочуть заборонити користування телефонами під час вечері.
translations.hu: A szüleim be akarják tiltani a telefonhasználatot vacsora közben.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता रात के खाने के दौरान फोन इस्तेमाल करने पर प्रतिबंध लगाना चाहते हैं.
translations.pl: Moi rodzice chcą zakazać korzystania z telefonów podczas kolacji.
translations.el: Οι γονείς μου θέλουν να απαγορεύσουν τη χρήση τηλεφώνων κατά το δείπνο.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine vil forby bruk av telefoner under middagen.
translations.id: Orang tua saya ingin melarang penggunaan ponsel saat makan malam.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar vill förbjuda mobiler under middagen.
translations.ro: Părinții mei vor să interzică folosirea telefoanelor la cină.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče chtějí zakázat používání telefonů během večeře.
translations.da: Mine forældre vil forbyde brug af telefoner under middagen.
translations.fi: Vanhempani haluavat kieltää puhelimien käytön illallisella.
translations.ja: 両親は夕食中のスマホ使用を禁止したいと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner modifying 'Eltern'; nominative plural, agrees with the subject.
Plural noun serving as the subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present, 3rd person plural; selects the bare infinitive 'verbieten' as complement.
Common noun, accusative plural; direct object of 'verbieten'.
Contraction of 'bei dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing the PP 'beim Essen' (circumstance/time).
Noun in dative singular (object of 'bei'); part of the PP specifying the context ('beim Essen').
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'wollen'.

sentences.target: Der Lehrer will laute Musik verbieten.

translations.de: Der Lehrer will laute Musik verbieten.
translations.en: The teacher wants to ban loud music.
translations.es: El profesor quiere prohibir la música alta.
translations.fr: Le professeur veut interdire la musique forte.
translations.it: L'insegnante vuole vietare la musica ad alto volume.
translations.zh-Hans: 老师想禁止大声播放音乐。
translations.yue: 老師想禁止播好嘈嘅音樂。
translations.pt: O professor quer proibir música alta.
translations.tr: Öğretmen yüksek sesli müziği yasaklamak istiyor.
translations.vi: Giáo viên muốn cấm mở nhạc to.
translations.nl: De leraar wil luide muziek verbieden.
translations.hu: A tanár be akarja tiltani a hangos zenét.
translations.hi: अध्यापक तेज संगीत पर प्रतिबंध लगाना चाहते हैं.
translations.el: Ο δάσκαλος θέλει να απαγορεύσει τη δυνατή μουσική.
translations.id: Guru ingin melarang musik yang keras.
translations.ro: Profesorul vrea să interzică muzica tare.
translations.fi: Opettaja haluaa kieltää liian kovan musiikin.
translations.ja: 先生は大音量の音楽を禁止したいと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular masculine; determiner of 'Lehrer'.
Noun, nominative singular masculine; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present, 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbieten'.
Attributive adjective with strong inflection (no article), accusative singular feminine; modifies 'Musik'.
Noun, accusative singular feminine; direct object of 'verbieten'.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

sentences.target: Die Stadt will das Grillen im Park verbieten.
sentences.reading: /diː ʃtat vɪl das ˈɡʁɪlən ɪm paʁk fɛɐ̯ˈbiːtən/

translations.de: Die Stadt will das Grillen im Park verbieten.
translations.ipa: /diː ʃtat vɪl das ˈɡʁɪlən ɪm paʁk fɛɐ̯ˈbiːtən/
translations.en: The city wants to ban barbecuing in the park.
translations.es: La ciudad quiere prohibir hacer barbacoas en el parque.
translations.fr: La ville veut interdire les barbecues dans le parc.
translations.it: La città vuole vietare le grigliate nel parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 市里想禁止在公园里烧烤。
translations.yue: 市政府想禁止喺公園燒烤。
translations.ru: Город хочет запретить барбекю в парке.
translations.pt: A cidade quer proibir fazer churrasco no parque.
translations.he: העיר רוצה לאסור לעשות מנגל בפארק.
translations.tr: Belediye parkta mangal yapmayı yasaklamak istiyor.
translations.vi: Thành phố muốn cấm nướng thịt trong công viên.
translations.ar: المدينة تريد حظر الشواء في الحديقة.
translations.nl: De stad wil barbecueën in het park verbieden.
translations.uk: Місто хоче заборонити барбекю в парку.
translations.hu: A város be akarja tiltani a grillezést a parkban.
translations.hi: शहर पार्क में बारबेक्यू करने पर प्रतिबंध लगाना चाहता है.
translations.pl: Miasto chce zakazać grillowania w parku.
translations.el: Η πόλη θέλει να απαγορεύσει το μπάρμπεκιου στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Byen vil forby grilling i parken.
translations.id: Kota ingin melarang barbeku di taman.
translations.sv: Staden vill förbjuda grillning i parken.
translations.ro: Orașul vrea să interzică grătarele în parc.
translations.cs: Město chce zakázat grilování v parku.
translations.da: Byen vil forbyde grillning i parken.
translations.ja: 市は公園でのバーベキューを禁止したいと思っている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative singular feminine; determiner of 'Stadt'.
Noun, nominative singular feminine; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, finite present, 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbieten'.
Definite article, accusative singular neuter; determiner of nominalized 'Grillen'.
Nominalized infinitive functioning as a neuter noun; accusative singular; direct object of 'verbieten'.
Contraction of 'in dem'; preposition governing dative, introducing the locative PP 'im Park'.
Noun, dative singular masculine; object of 'in'; forms a locative PP.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'will'.

translations.fr: On ne peut pas interdire ça.
translations.vi: Cái đó không thể cấm được.
translations.hi: इसे प्रतिबंधित नहीं किया जा सकता.
translations.sv: Det går inte att förbjuda det.

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun; nominative singular; generic subject.
Modal auxiliary, finite present, 3rd person singular; selects the bare infinitive 'verbieten'.
Pronoun, accusative singular neuter; direct object referring to prior discourse.
Negation particle; negates the predicate/VP.
Lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement of the modal 'kann'.
